title: Omnixerio Devices Mod
description: Adds working devices to the game, including laptops.
body:
![Mod Loader: Fabric/Forge/NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-fabric%2Fforge%2Fneoforge-lightgray?style=for-the-badge)![Requires: Architectury](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-architectury-lightgray?style=for-the-badge)

*Adds working devices to the game, including laptops.*  
<u>**NOTE THAT ALPHA AND BETA VERSIONS MAY
INCLUDE GAME BREAKING BUGS AND CRASHES**</u>

## ⚠ IMPORTANT ⚠
DO NOT REPORT ANY ISSUES RELATED OF THIS MOD TO MRCRAYFISH,  
THIS IS AN UNOFFICIAL PORT MADE BY XYPERCODE AND JAB125  

## Features
 * Working laptop, that has apps like an email app, web browser, file manager.
 * Printer that you can use to print art you made in  

<iframe width="1268" height="713" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/IaM6FbdOctE" title="Devices Mod Preview (1.19.3)" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Notes and Credits
Thanks to MrCrayfish for the original mod called ([MrCrayfish's Device Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-device-mod)) made for 1.12.2

This mod requires the [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/architectury-api) mod.

## Source code
The source code is on GitHub: [Ultreon / devices-mod](https://github.com/Ultreon/devices-mod)
